_comment: Atomic OS — Codex CLI hook config (genericized / portable). Mirrors the Claude Code + OpenCode atomic-edit law: native code edits (Write/Edit/MultiEdit/Bash-in-place/apply_patch) are routed through the shared atomic-only-hook.mjs and denied; only the atomic-edit MCP tools may mutate code; session end runs the trace-coverage audit. The original deployment also chained KLOEL-specific scripts/decomp/* gates — REMOVED here, this enforces ONLY the atomic law. Set ATOMIC_OS_HOME to your atomic-os checkout (defaults to <repo>/atomic-os). Install: copy to .codex/hooks.json at the repo you want gated. See integrations/codex/README.md.
